headline: Multi-Line Insurance Stocks Q1 Recap: Benchmarking AIG (NYSE:AIG)
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how multi-line insurance stocks fared in Q1, starting with AIG (NYSE:AIG).
